steps.title: Read the correct table entry
steps.content: Use the row for an air temperature of $27^\circ$ F and the column for a wind speed of $20$ miles per hour. The intersection gives a wind chill of $13^\circ$ F.

steps.title: Enter the number only
steps.content: The question says to disregard the degree symbol, so enter only the numerical value. The answer is 13.
